description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a combination of white and light wood exterior finishes. The structure includes large glass windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and a sense of openness. The front facade showcases a covered entryway, a driveway with a parked car, and a landscaped area with decorative plants. The house has multiple balconies and terraces, some with glass railings, enhancing outdoor living spaces. The rear side includes a spacious patio and additional landscaping, while the overall layout emphasizes geometric forms and functional outdoor areas. The architectural style is distinctly contemporary, with an emphasis on horizontal planes and open interiors.
description: A modern, multi-level house with flat roofs, large glass windows, and a mix of white and wood finishes, featuring balconies, terraces, and landscaped areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway with a car, covered porch, and decorative landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage area, and a landscaped section with bushes along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large patio, open terrace, and extensive glass windows, with a focus on outdoor living spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional balconies, terraces, and a fenced yard area with landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with a flat overhang, wide door, and adjacent landscaped area, accessible from the driveway
